title: the strongest sword
body:
![the strongest sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5fe9da131578c76ededabb5928188386e6aefe.png)
This mod gives you the most powerful sword in the game. This sword is crafted from wood, stone, iron, diamonds, and has a Nazar Rate rating of 40, a speed of 1.4, an efficiency of 30, and an enchantability of 25.
